query:
SELECT a.id as account_id, a.name as account_name,
       ai.id as integration_id, ai.provider, ai.provider_user_id, ai.provider_user_name, ai.is_active,
       ai.created_at
FROM accounts a
LEFT JOIN account_integrations ai ON ai.account_id = a.id AND ai.provider = 'facebook'
WHERE a.name LIKE '%Premier%' OR a.name LIKE '%Mortgage%'
ORDER BY a.id;
